heading: Lakehaven, Washington, Water Reclamation and Reuse Project
label: 390h–17 Lakehaven, Washington, Water Reclamation and Reuse Project

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Lakehaven Utility District, Washington, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of, and land acquisition for, a project to reclaim and reuse wastewater, including degraded groundwaters, within and outside of the service area of the Lakehaven Utility District.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of the project authorized by this section shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost of the project.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation and maintenance of the project authorized by this section.
